name: GitHub pilot cross-repo de-referenced — embedder+relation-map
hypothesis: Frozen sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 + an identity-initialized relation operator.
leakage_checks: references scrubbed; train repos disjoint from test repos; embeddings are frozen (no fit on test repos).
known_limitations: Pilot scale; frozen general-text embedder (not code-specific); relation head trained on ~180 cross-repo pairs. Exploratory.
